jirarest 0.2.0
  • Reference

Get time spent on issues with specified labels

Source: R/get_label_worklogs.R
get_label_worklogs.Rd

The duration of time spent on all issues related to a set of labels within a date range is reported.

Usage

get_label_worklogs(
  labels,
  project = "BC",
  from = NULL,
  to = NULL,
  maxResults = 50
)

Arguments

labels

vector of labels

project

jira project name

from

start date of range to consider issues. Defaults to first day of current year

to

end date of range to consider issues. Defaults to current date.

maxResults

maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50.

Author

Derek Chiu
